title: Bonsenkitchen Precut Vacuum Sealer Bags, 200 Pcs 15 x 23 CM Food Sealer Bags,Commercial Grade, BPA Free, Heavy Duty, Customized Size Vacuum Bags for Vac Storage, Meal Prep or Sous Vide Cooking, VB31
features: Economical & Time Saving: Bonsenkitchen 200 pcs 15 cm x 23 cm precut vacuum sealer bags are large packaging, meet your long-term usage needs. Vacuum bags are pre-cut and ready-to-use, saving you time whenever you’re preserving leftovers, preparing make-ahead meals, and portioning bulk items in the freezer

Safe & BPA Free: All food vacuum saver bags are made from BPA-free, commercial food grade materials, ensuring they are safe for all types of food storage. Allows you to precisely control your cooking temperature to achieve perfect results. You can cook sous vide in Bonsenkitchen bags by placing them in water at any temperature up to 195°F/90°C

Universal Design: Food sealer bags are compatible with all major brand vacuum sealers, providing you with a hassle-free and straight forward sealing experience. Our vacuum bags can fit machine perfectly(especially Bonsenkitchen vacuum sealer machine), ensuring a reliable seal every time

Long Time Preservation: Vacuum seal bags have deeper air passages than other brands for a better seal, keeping food moisture and forming an airtight barrier，keeping food 6 times fresh without freezer burn or dehydration
Versatile Applications for Food Storage: Bonsenkitchen food vacuum storage bags can be microwaved, frozen, reusable, boiled and so on. Perfect for storing vegetables, seafood, ribs and beans,etc
